title: gurkan's super duper mod
description: a mod with random additions that I find neat
body:
# gurkan's super duper mod

this is a mod _mainly intended_ for a private minecraft server that i'm running, but people might like it so i'm publishing it anyways

this mod adds the following:
- ~~a silence mobs name tag (configurable), ported from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) (since 0.2.0, removed in 0.6.0)~~
- a silencer stick (since 0.6.0)
- leashable villagers (since 0.3.0)
- disables crop trampling when you have feather falling (or the slow falling effect) (since 0.3.0)

## credits
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ (only applies for versions under 0.6.0)
